category_sources: Official makojs.dev documentation describes Mako as an extremely fast production-grade web bundler.
source_facts.description says mako is a production-grade web bundler based on Rust.
display_name_sources: Official makojs.dev documentation uses the display name Mako.
docs_sources: Official makojs.dev documentation has a dedicated /docs/ section.
Official makojs.dev getting-started page documents installation and first use.
repo_sources: Official makojs.dev documentation links to GitHub from its documentation pages.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official makojs.dev GitHub link, which redirects to the utooland/utoo repository.
tags_sources: Official makojs.dev documentation describes JavaScript/TypeScript, React, CSS, and bundling support.
source_facts.description identifies a Rust-based web bundler.
